description: Darkroom loading bench in slight 3/4 view: open cassette with front/back lead screens as bright plates, closed light-tight film bin behind, bare hands lifting one sheet by its top corners with a slow lift-and-settle loop, muted warm-red safelight cone pulsing from upper left, and a lower-right radiograph inset where crescent + fingerprint ghosts flicker in on 'prints it, disguised as a defect'.
